event.name: Asian Night Market 2026
event.front_page_content:
The Asian Night Market returns to Memphis — bigger than ever with two nights of Asian street food, culture, and community. With 8,000+ attendees and 100+ vendors, it's the Mid-South's premier Asian cultural festival. Vendor applications are now open.

Location: Agricenter Outdoor (7777 Walnut Grove Rd, Memphis)

Dates: September 26-27, 2026
event.banner_text: New this year: 2-day Mid-Autumn Festival Asian Night Market — our biggest event yet!
event.payment_instructions: Your registration has been approved. Please complete payment to secure your space. Unpaid space may be reassigned.
event.insurance_instructions:
Liability Insurance

All vendors are required to have liability insurance for this event.

If you already have business insurance, add us as an Additional Insured / Certificate Holder:

Vietnamese American Community of West Tennessee
1276 Grant Park Cove
Collierville, Tennessee 38017

If you need to purchase insurance, you can get a two-day policy from FLIP:

Purchase food-vendor insurance for Asian Night Market on FLIP

Purchase arts/craft-vendor insurance for Asian Night Market on FLIP
event.vendor_agreement_text:
VENDOR PARTICIPATION AGREEMENT

By submitting this registration, you agree to the following terms and conditions:

1. EVENT DETAILS: The Asian Night Market will be held on the date specified above. Setup begins at 2:00 PM; the event runs from 5:00 PM to 10:00 PM.

2. BOOTH ASSIGNMENT: Booth locations are assigned by the organizers. Vendors may not request specific spots.

3. INSURANCE: All vendors must provide a Certificate of General Liability Insurance prior to the event.

4. CANCELLATION & REFUNDS: Cancellations must be requested through the organizers. Refund amounts are at the discretion of the organizing committee.

5. CONDUCT: Vendors must maintain a clean and safe booth area. Excessive noise, inappropriate signage, or disruptive behavior may result in removal without refund.

6. LIABILITY: The vendor assumes all responsibility for their booth, products, and staff. The organizing committee is not liable for any loss, damage, or injury.

7. HEALTH COMPLIANCE: Food vendors must comply with all local health department regulations and obtain necessary permits.

8. The organizing committee reserves the right to reject or revoke participation at any time.

booth_types.name: Premium Booth
booth_types.description: Prime location near entrance, corner spots, or high foot traffic areas. The booth dimension is 22 ft wide (front facing) × 30 ft deep.

booth_types.name: Regular Booth
booth_types.description: Standard booth space in the main vendor area. The booth dimension is 22 ft wide (front facing) × 30 ft deep.

booth_types.name: Compact Booth
booth_types.description: Smaller footprint for vendors with minimal setup. The booth dimension is 12 ft wide (front facing) × 15 ft deep.
